# QLPreviewReplyAttachment | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Quick Look ](/documentation/quicklook)

-  QLPreviewReplyAttachment 

Class# QLPreviewReplyAttachment

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
class QLPreviewReplyAttachment
```

## [Overview](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment#overview)

QLPreviewReplyAttachment is used to provide data for attachment in html data-based previews.

## [Topics](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment#topics)

### [Initializers](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment#Initializers)

[`init(data: Data, contentType: UTType)`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment/init(data:contenttype:))### [Instance Properties](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment#Instance-Properties)

[`var contentType: UTType`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment/contenttype)The content type of the attachment for an html preview[`var data: Data`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment/data)The data content of an html preview## [Relationships](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment#relationships)

## [See Also](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment#see-also)

### [QuickLookUI symbols](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment#QuickLookUI-symbols)

[`class QLFilePreviewRequest`](/documentation/quicklook/qlfilepreviewrequest)[`class QLPreviewProvider`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewprovider)[`class QLPreviewReply`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply)[`protocol QLPreviewItem`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewitem)[`protocol QLPreviewingController`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewingcontroller)For view based previews, the view controller that implements the QLPreviewingController protocol must at least implement one of the two following methods: -[QLPreviewingController preparePreviewOfSearchableItemWithIdentifier:queryString:completionHandler:], to generate previews for Spotlight searchable items. -[QLPreviewingController preparePreviewOfFileAtURL:completionHandler:], to generate previews for file URLs.
